title: Monday.com down?
excerpt: I’ve been trying to access monday.com for the last 15 munites. Either it just says “Try again,” does nothing but show a loading animation, says that the site is down for maintennce, or shows an “unsupported location” mes…

posts.author: tjb (Troy Brophy)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve been trying to access monday.com for the last 15 munites. Either it just says “Try again,” does nothing but show a loading animation, says that the site is down for maintennce, or shows an “unsupported location” message.

Is anyone else experiencing this?

posts.author: dnmonday (Desmond)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, there’s some outage going on right now. You can see that status of the platform here if you’re curious. It gets updated pretty quick/real time

posts.author: JorgeBabel (Jorge)
posts.cookedHtml: Check monday status at: https://status.monday.com/. If there is a general problem you will find it there
